conversations.content: What's a good summary of my 100 most recent transactions this year in terms of categories and amounts?

<function_thought>
To summarize the user's 100 most recent transactions in terms of categories and amounts, I will first retrieve the transactions using the `get_most_recent_transactions` function. Once I have the transaction data, I can analyze it to categorize and summarize the amounts. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_most_recent_transactions(n=100)]</function_call>
